application.title: DEVTOOLS GRIST CUSTOM WIDGET
application.description: 📦 CLI tool for rapid local prototyping and deployment of Grist custom widgets using Vite.js.

options.verbose_description: Display detailed logs and execution steps
options.clear_description: Clear the console screen before running

dev.description: Launch the Grist custom widget development environment.
dev.ready: Grist custom widget development environment is ready!
dev.shutdown_success: Houston, we have... a completely successfully shutdown!
dev.error_stopping_vite: Error stopping Vite local web server.
dev.error_unexpected: An unexpected error occurred in dev command.
dev.error_timeout_docker: Docker containers down command was forcefully terminated with SIGKILL after timeout.
dev.error_signal_docker: Docker containers command was terminated by signal: {{signal}}.
dev.error_failed_docker: Failed to stop Docker containers automatically.
dev.option_vite_port: Port for the Vite.js local server [default: {{default}}]
dev.option_grist_port: Port for the Grist Docker container [default: {{default}}]

config.description: Manages application preferences using the following actions (get, set, list).
config.value_description: The value to set for the given configuration key.

actions.get: To get value of a given key
actions.set: To set a value for a given key
actions.list: To list all keys and values

fields.lang: The display language of the application CLI.
fields.clearBeforeRunning: Automatically clears the terminal screen before running the application CLI.

config.success_set: ✅ Configuration updated: '{{key}}' is now set to '{{value}}'.
config.error_missing_key:
⚠️  Missing configuration key. 

Use the command action '{{action}}' to view available keys.
config.error_key_not_found:
⚠️ Configuration key '{{key}}' not found.

Use the command action '{{action}}' to view available keys.
config.error_invalid_boolean: ❌ Invalid value for '{{key}}'. Expected 'true' or 'false' but received '{{value}}'.

errors.fatal: 💥 Fatal error: Unable to start the application. A critical error has occurred.
